3251990.name: Glimmer Fighters
3251990.description:
Welcome to Glimmer Fighters! Participate in an all-new fighting game against your foes.

With the planet's surface being stripped of most of its sunlight, Glimmer Power is society's only source of light.

Participate in the Glimmer Fighters Tournament, organized by the mega corporation Glim-Corp, to receive its grand prize of a life-long supply of Glimmer Power to the winner.

Exciting roster of characters

Play interesting never before seen characters fighting with each their own set of ambitions and reasons for participating in the Glimmer Fighters Tournament. Every character comes with at least one other color variation.

Easy to master controls

As a beginner in fighting games or a veteran, you will find something to enjoy in this easy to understand but fun to master gameplay.

Learn to master the natural abundance of Glimmer Power

With each hit traded, your shared Glimmer Gauge will fill. Strategically trade hits to fill out the Glimmer Gauge to trigger an all powerful burst of raw Glimmer Power, affecting all the fighters and environment, but be careful not to trade hits or else with the Glimmer Gauge emptied out the surrounding light will also disappear from yours and your enemies grasps.

Stylized aesthetics

With colorful and eye-catching aesthetics, be it 2D or 3D, this game will certainly be a pleasant experience of the eyes.

Small indie development team

Glimmer Fighters was created as a student project within six months of development by a team of six. Our team consisting of two Programmers, three Game Artists and a Musician. We are happy to announce the early-access release of our team project and hope everyone will be able to enjoy the time and effort spent into this student project.
3251990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
